exit_code_meaning: npm audit exits non-zero when ANY vulnerabilities are found. Exit 1 here = 13 total findings including 2 high.

high_severity_findings.title: fast-xml-builder allows attribute values with unwanted quotes to bypass malicious or unwanted attributes
protobuf.js: Code injection through bytes field defaults in generated toObject code

moderate_severity_findings.title: uuid: Missing buffer bounds check in v3/v5/v6 when buf is provided

verdict: YELLOW — 2 high-severity advisories in transitive deps (fast-xml-builder, protobufjs). All affect server-side Cloud Functions. Runtime exploitability low (we don't parse untrusted XML; protobuf default-byte injection requires generated-code path we don't exercise) but should be tracked for upstream upgrade.
